---
title: "🎓 Allegheny College Computer Science - College Fair"
subtitle: "Welcome Future Computer Scientists! Start Your CS Adventure Here"
format:
  live-html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
# 🦀 Welcome to CS Quest!

**Discover Computer Science at Allegheny College**

Interactive quests designed to help you explore what Computer Science really is—and whether it's right for you!
:::

## 🎯 Start Your 15-Minute CS Discovery!

Perfect for college fair visitors! Complete these 5 interactive quests to:

✅ Understand what Computer Science actually is  
✅ See how CS appears in your daily life  
✅ Explore career opportunities and salaries  
✅ Write your very first program!  
✅ Discover your next steps

<div class="quest-grid">

::: {.quest-card}
### 🌟 Quest 1: What IS Computer Science?
**3 minutes**

Discover CS beyond just coding—it's problem solving, creativity, and innovation!

[Start Quest 1 →](demo/00-welcome-to-cs.qmd)
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🔍 Quest 2: CS in Your Daily Life
**2 minutes**

Uncover the hidden CS behind your smartphone, Netflix, and more!

[Start Quest 2 →](demo/00-cs-daily-life.qmd)
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 💼 Quest 3: Why Study CS?
**3 minutes**

Explore careers, salaries ($100K+ median!), and why Allegheny is special.

[Start Quest 3 →](demo/00-why-study-cs.qmd)
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### ⚡ Quest 4: Write Your First Program!
**5 minutes**

Experience the thrill of coding! No experience needed—just curiosity!

[Start Quest 4 →](demo/00-try-it-yourself.qmd)
:::

::: {.quest-card}
### 🗺️ Quest 5: What's Next?
**2 minutes**

Get your personalized action plan for continuing your CS journey!

[Start Quest 5 →](demo/00-whats-next.qmd)
:::

</div>

## 🚀 After the Fair: Continue Learning!

Enjoyed the demo quests? We have **19 more in-depth Rust programming quests** waiting for you!

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-info}
**🦀 Rust Coding Quests**

Learn Rust programming from scratch with hands-on challenges:
- Variables, Types, Functions (Quests 1-6)
- Build Real Programs (Quests 7-10)
- Algorithms & Patterns (Quests 11-19)

[Explore All 19 Coding Quests →](index.qmd)
:::

## 📊 Quick Facts About CS at Allegheny

::: {.highlight-box .highlight-success}
**💰 Career Outlook:**
- Median salary: $100,530/year
- 15% job growth through 2032
- Work from anywhere opportunities
- Every industry needs CS talent

**🎓 Allegheny Advantages:**
- Small classes, personal attention
- Hands-on learning from day one
- Liberal arts + technical skills
- Strong alumni network
- Research opportunities

**🌈 Flexible Options:**
- Major, Minor, or just try a course!
- Pair CS with ANY other field
- No prior experience needed
:::

## 📱 Save This Site!

**Bookmark this page** to return anytime:

🔗 **[Your College Fair Landing Page URL]**

Or scan the QR code at our booth!

## 📞 Connect With Us

::: {.tip-box}
**📧 Email:** [cs@allegheny.edu](mailto:cs@allegheny.edu)  
**🌐 Website:** [cs.allegheny.edu](https://cs.allegheny.edu)  
**📍 Location:** Alden Hall, Allegheny College  
**📆 Schedule Visit:** [allegheny.edu/visit](https://allegheny.edu/visit)

**Questions? Talk to:**
- Oliver Bonham-Carter: [obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu](mailto:obonhamcarter@allegheny.edu)
- Visit: [oliverbonhamcarter.com](https://www.oliverbonhamcarter.com)
:::

## 🎓 Your Action Plan

**Today at the Fair:**
- [ ] Complete the 5 Demo Quests (15 min)
- [ ] Talk to CS professors and students
- [ ] Pick up CS department materials
- [ ] Save this website URL

**This Week:**
- [ ] Try Coding Quests 1-5
- [ ] Email the CS department with questions
- [ ] Explore [Rust Playground](https://play.rust-lang.org/)
- [ ] Tell a friend about CS!

**This Month:**
- [ ] Schedule an Allegheny campus visit
- [ ] Research CS + your other interests
- [ ] Complete 10+ coding quests
- [ ] Follow Allegheny CS on social media

---

::: {.hero}
# 🚀 Ready to Begin?

**Click below to start your CS adventure!**

[🌟 Start Quest 1: What IS Computer Science? →](demo/00-welcome-to-cs.qmd)

</:::

---

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 2rem;">
**Welcome to the world of Computer Science!** 💻✨  
We can't wait to see what you'll create.
</div>
